description: Create a stunning landing page for NeuralChat - an AI chat system with Graph Memory that learns and connects knowledge from conversations and Gmail. Design should be modern, dark theme with neural network/graph visual elements and gradient accents (purple/blue/cyan). Include: 1) Hero section with catchy headline about AI that remembers and connects your knowledge, animated neural network background effect, and a prominent 'Start Chatting' button that links to https://6215-ij3ygi74kikgit27zui6x.e2b.app 2) Features section highlighting: Graph Memory (AI remembers conversations and builds knowledge connections), Gmail Integration (automatically extracts insights from emails), Global Knowledge (shared learning across all conversations), PII Protection (smart detection keeps personal info private) 3) How it works section with 3 steps: Chat naturally, AI extracts insights and topics, Knowledge graph grows and connects 4) Footer with simple branding. Make it feel cutting-edge, intelligent, and premium. The 'Start Chatting' button should be prominent and appear in both the hero and as a floating/sticky element.

Rename all instances of 'NeuralChat' to 'Orange1' throughout the entire landing page. This includes the logo text, page title, any headings, footer branding, and meta tags. Keep everything else the same - just rebrand from NeuralChat to Orange1.
